query:
-- Atualizar campo league dos jogadores com base nos times recém-inseridos
UPDATE players p
JOIN teams t ON p.club = t.name
JOIN leagues l ON t.leagueId = l.id
SET p.league = l.name
WHERE p.league IS NULL OR p.league = '';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT l.name as liga, COUNT(*) as jogadores
FROM players p
JOIN teams t ON p.club = t.name
JOIN leagues l ON t.leagueId = l.id
WHERE l.countryId IN (30002, 30003, 30004, 30005, 30006, 30007, 30008, 30009, 30010, 30011, 30012, 30013)
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY jogadores DESC
LIMIT 20;
